docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. PETITION ACTION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF NATHAN ANDERSON IN SUPPORT OF PETITION OF ATC PARTNERS, LLC FOR JUDGMENT AUTHORIZING AND DIRECTING THE SECRETARY OF STATE OF CALIFORNIA TO REINSTATE PETITIONER TO ACTIVE STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 60122485) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATC PARTNERS, LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-15-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ATC PARTNERS, LLC'S PETITION TO REINSTATE ATC PARTNERS, LLC TO ACTIVE STATUS IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Reinstate Atc Partners, Llc To Active Status
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ATC PARTNERS, LLC'S Petition To Reinstate ATC Partners, LLC To Active Status is GRANTED. Good cause shown. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (D302)
